name: City Beach
description: These courts are shared with tennis.  There is a shared schedule posted on the fence.  These courts are Park & Rec courts.  Reservations not allowed but players schedule sessions online to put games together.  Usually during pickleball scheduled mornings, there is open drop in play.

name: Clark Fork High School
description: Clark Fork High School is a place to play pickleball in Clark Fork, ID. The court surface is asphalt. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Coolin city Park
description: Playground is next door. Also has well kept bathroom and covered picnic pavilion.
open_play_schedule: Open normal city Park hours, Dawn to dusk.

name: Hill's Resort
description: Hill's Resort is a place to play pickleball in Lamb Creek, ID. There is 1 outdoor hard and asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Reservations are available. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, food, and water.

name: James E Russell Sports Center
description: James E Russell Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sandpoint, ID. There are 14 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Drop in play $15 for 2 hours.  Event pricing is usually $10 per session.

name: Lakeview/Memorial Park
description: These courts are Park & Rec courts.  Reservations not allowed but players schedule sessions online to put games together.  Most mornings, there is open drop in play.

name: Litehouse YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Litehouse YMCA in Sandpoint, ID! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Ponderay Shores Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Ponderay Shores Resort in Hope, ID! There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Stoneridge Golf And Recreational Community
description: After turning on Chatwold Rd. continue past clubhouse and tennis courts.
fees: Members only — $5 non member fee payable at clubhouse

name: The Cedars Pickleball Club
description: Two premium indoor courts.  Open play and private play sessions. Court Reserve used for registration and reservations.
